knimeNode.name: Container Output (Raw HTTP)
knimeNode.shortDescription: Reads the first cell of a binary column from a table and makes its content available to an external caller as body of an HTTP Request. Columns from the second input table are sent as HTTP headers. There can only be one Container Output node when this node is part of the workflow. If no content-type header is specified in the header table, application/octet-stream is returned.

fullDescription.intro: This node produces a raw HTTP response with headers, body, and status code configurable via the input tables and dialog options. The headers are sent back to the client as response headers and the body data is sent in the HTTP response body.
fullDescription.option: The HTTP status code to send back to the client.

ports.inPort: A table containing a binary column whose content is made available to the caller.
A table containing headers made available to the caller. Each column is treated as a header, with the column name being the header name and the value in the first row being the value for the header.
